sources.title: Assumptions & Sources
sources.disclaimer: Financial estimates based on publicly available data and industry analysis

tooltips.strikeCost: Fixed at $100M/day based on analyst estimates
tooltips.salaryIncrease: Base salary increase percentage - industry standard varies 3-15%
tooltips.contractDuration: Longer contracts spread costs over more years but lock in terms
tooltips.unpaidPercent: How much of the 35 hours/month of ground duties get paid? Air Canada offered 50%; union wants 100%
tooltips.parityLock: Targets the Air Transat benchmark as the top rate. Sets higher hourly before calculating unpaid time value
tooltips.negotiationPressure: As strike costs accumulate, pressure increases to settle
